name: lccalib

metadata.name: lccalib
metadata.summary: SNe calibration package for the Lemaitre pipeline

documentation:
# lccalib

[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/lccalib.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/lccalib)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/lccalib.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/lccalib)

-----

## Installation

```console
pip install lccalib
```

## Usage

Have a look at the demo scripts in the `tests` subfolder. 

## Authors and acknowledgment

TBD generic statement about Lemaitre acknowledgment policy.

modules.name: lccalib.survey
documentation: Interface to various survey inputs.

classes.name: lccalib.survey.Survey

methods.name: lccalib.survey.Survey.get_secondary_star_catalog
documentation: Return the calibrated secondary stars catalog.

methods.name: lccalib.survey.Survey.get_secondary_star_lc
documentation: Return the secondary stars light curves.

methods.name: lccalib.survey.Survey.get_sne_lc
documentation: Return the supernovae light curves.

methods.name: lccalib.survey.Survey.get_secondary_labels
documentation:
Return a dictionary giving the column names in secondary catalog.

The dictionary should looks like:
\>>> dict( {
\>>> "mag": str,
\>>> "emag": str,
\>>> "color": (str, str) ,
\>>> "goods": dict({str: float}), #name and threshold
\>>> "mag_cut": (float, float) })

methods.name: lccalib.survey.Survey.bands
documentation: Return list of bands
Abstract class defining the minimum required inputs for any survey.
pylint:disable=W0221

modules.name: lccalib.__about__
documentation: version number management.

modules.name: lccalib.zp
documentation: Tools to fit a zp from a color transformation

functions.name: lccalib.zp.get_matched_cats
documentation:
Align secondary star catalog with star lc catalog

```
param survey

secondary star catalog provider

param recarray star_lc_cat

lc averaged catalog

param logger

logger

param dict by

loop over values given by dict unique key

return recarray star_selec

aligned secondary star catalog

return recarray lc_selec

aligned lc star catalog

return list index

selected index of secondary catalog
```
pylint: disable=invalid-name,too-many-locals,too-many-arguments

functions.name: lccalib.zp.plot_diff_mag
documentation:
Plot mag difference between lc and secondary star catalogs.

```
param survey

secondary star catalog provider

param recarray star_selec

aligned secondary star catalog

param recarray lc_selec

aligned light curve star catalog

param str xlabel

can be mag or color

return

fig, ax
```
pylint: disable=dangerous-default-value

functions.name: lccalib.zp.compute_zp
documentation:
Fit a zp per zpkey (like ccd, name) and a joined linear color term

```
param survey

secondary star catalog provider

param band

band name

param recarray star_selec

aligned secondary star catalog

param recarray lc_selec

aligned light curve star catalog

param list color_range

color range on which the fit is done

param str zpkey

column name of lc_selec on which zp apply

return dict dfit

dict with all fitted quantities
```

functions.name: lccalib.zp.plot_zpfit_res
documentation:
Plot zp fit residuals.

```
param str xlabel

can be mag or color

return

fig, ax
```
pylint: disable=dangerous-default-value

functions.name: lccalib.zp.zpfit_diagnostic
documentation:
Plot zpfit diagnostic including rms of the residual compared to
measurement error and chi2.

functions.name: lccalib.zp.make_bins
documentation:
Define nbins bin in x.
:param array x: x
:param int nbins: number of bins
:return array bins: bins limit
:return array xbinned: binned version of x
:return array xerr: bins size
:return array index: index of x corresponding to each bin

modules.name: lccalib.averaging
documentation: Tools to make a single light curve catalog with averaged flux

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.get_gaia_match
documentation:
Return aligned Gaia and input star subset catalog.

TODO: apply pm.
pylint: disable=invalid-name,too-many-locals, too-many-arguments,dangerous-default-value

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.cut_from_epoch_number
documentation: cut stars with less than 3 epochs

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.star_lc_averager
documentation: Compute average flux and associated errors.

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.add_columns
documentation: Complete average catalog with columns

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.plot_night_averager
documentation:
Show a comparison of residual dispersion and expected errors for
the night average fit, stacked over several nights.

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.plot_single_night_averager
documentation: Averager control plots.

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.plot_star_averager
documentation: Averager control plots.

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.night_averager
documentation:
Compute mean flux per night.

:param recarray T: input catalog
:return array avg_cat: mjd, flux, flux_err
:return array indices: mjd indices

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.chain_averaging
documentation:
Chain night and star averaging.

:param recarray lccat: star light curve catalog
:return recarray cat: night averaged catalog
:return recaraay star_lc_cat: star averaged catalog

functions.name: lccalib.averaging.lc_stack
documentation:
Stack all catalogs in a single one

:param dict d_iterator: keys and values indexing catalogs
:param func fn_provider: function which return a catalog filename for a given set of key/value
:param str list bands: list of band names
:param str list cols: list of columns to stack, named col_band in stacked catalog
:return recaraay stacked: stacked catalog

documentation: Return keys, values from file header.

functions.name: lccalib.ntuple.convert
documentation: Convert into python type.

functions.name: lccalib.ntuple.fromtxt

modules.name: lccalib.match
documentation: Tools to match object from their sky (ra,dec) coordinates.

documentation: return euclidian distance.
pylint: disable=dangerous-default-value, consider-using-enumerate, too-many-locals

functions.name: lccalib.match.haversine
documentation: return haversine distance.

functions.name: lccalib.match.gnomonic_projection
documentation: ra,dec to x,y.

functions.name: lccalib.match.assoc
documentation: Return an index and a catalog of associated objects.

functions.name: lccalib.match.match
documentation: Return an index that matches 2 catalogs.

functions.name: lccalib.match.radius_to_nside
documentation:
Find the smallest nside for wich a circle of radius radius is
contained within an healpy pixel.

radius: in radian

classes.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssoc

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssoc.append
documentation: populate clusters.

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssoc.match
documentation: choose min distance candidate from cluters.

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssoc.get_cat
documentation: convert clusters into catalog.

Solve the fixed-radius nearest neighbor search on a 2D cartesian
lattice

classes.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssocHealpy

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssocHealpy.append
documentation: Populate cluters.

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssocHealpy.match
documentation: choose min distance candidate from cluters.

methods.name: lccalib.match.NearestNeighAssocHealpy.get_cat
documentation: convert clusters into catalog.

Solve the fixed-radius nearest neighbor search on a 2D Healpy
lattice. Good for full-sky match.
